title: Cuba Antes de Castro — El País Que Nadie Te Mostró
quick_answer: Before 1959, Cuba ranked among Latin America's most prosperous nations — fourth in per capita income, first in television sets per household, with a literacy rate rivaling Europe. What the revolution inherited was not a failed state. It was a functioning society that it then systematically dismantled.
